caption:
🌙 The lecture hall was silent, save for the hum of the projector behind me. My fingers tapped nervously against the mahogany desk, the red blazer I wore draped loosely over my shoulders. Underneath, the fitted cream blouse hugged my torso, the fabric thin enough to hint at the curves I hid beneath. My black pencil skirt hugged my hips tightly, every step I took echoing in the empty room.

He had stayed late, too. A young researcher, ambitious and sharp, who always kept his eyes on me when I entered the room. Tonight, the air felt thicker, charged with something unspoken.

"Professor," he murmured, stepping closer. His voice dropped an octave. "I finished the draft."

I crossed my legs, the fabric of my skirt shifting as I did, exposing just a flash of sheer silk beneath. I leaned back, letting the blazer slide off one shoulder. "Show me," I purred, watching the way the light caught the swell of my chest.

We didn't move far. Just the width of the desk. Just enough for the tension to break. The lecture hall was ours. The rest of the university could wait. In the quiet, surrounded by the ghosts of knowledge, we discovered that the most exciting lectures weren't always on the syllabus.

#UniversityTeacher #LateNightStudy #ProfessorLife #CurvesAndChic #AcademicRomance #SexyTeacher #ElegantSeduction #NightMode #ItalianStyle #InstaVibes
